svg.title: Zere AI chatbot architecture with Redis cache
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing Browser, Next.js, Express WebSocket, Redis cache, FastAPI search, and Groq LLM

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user connect to Zere AI?')
sendPrompt('What does Next.js do in Zere AI?')
sendPrompt('What does the Express WebSocket service do?')
sendPrompt('How does Redis LLM caching work in Zere AI?')
sendPrompt('What data does Supabase store in Zere AI?')
sendPrompt('How does the FastAPI semantic search work?')
sendPrompt('How does FastAPI use Redis for search caching?')
sendPrompt('What is the Groq LLM used in Zere AI?')
